Sandbox_CompanionDogs_TameThreshold_tool: How much trust a dog must reach (by feeding) before it becomes your companion.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_MaxCompanions_tool: Maximum number of dogs a player can keep bonded at once. 0 = no limit. At the cap, taming new strays is blocked (the befriend option turns red); releasing or losing a dog frees a slot.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_CombatEnabled_tool: Allow companion dogs to attack nearby zombies.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_DogDamageMultiplie: Scales how much damage companion dogs deal to zombies, on top of each breed's power, skill level and Strength gene. 1.0 is the tuned default; higher hits harder, 0 makes their bite harmless. The weak caramelo mutt still can't finish a zombie on its own no matter how high this is set - that is by design.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_UpkeepEnabled_tool: Companions need care: feed them to keep hunger, loyalty and stress in check. A neglected dog disobeys.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_LoyaltyDecayPerDay: Loyalty points (0-100) a cared-for dog loses each in-game day. Decay is faster while it is hungry or thirsty.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_SentinelEnabled_to: The dog watches a wide area and warns you about zombies: a quiet growl for distant or few, a loud bark for close, many, or visible ones.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_AutoProtectEnabled: Enables the per-dog Auto-protect toggle: when on, a dog stands guard anchored on you while you sleep, eat, read, sit or fish, then goes back to following. Turn this off to disable the feature entirely.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_BondingEnabled_too: Petting your dog and sleeping beside it ease your Bored and Unhappy moodles a little. Petting also calms the dog and nudges its loyalty.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_RestedBuffEnabled_: After you sleep next to your dog, you wake up Well Rested for a while: a gentle, temporary buff that eases panic, stress, sadness and boredom and lets you tire more slowly. Turn this off to disable it.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_RestedBuffHours_to: How many in-game hours the Well Rested buff lasts after waking up beside your dog. Default 2.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_SkillsEnabled_tool: Companions learn skills (scent, combat, obedience...) by doing, improving their effectiveness over time.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_SkillXPRate_toolti: Global multiplier on all skill XP gains (scent, combat, obedience, hunting). 1.0 is normal; higher trains faster.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_HuntEnabled_toolti: Master switch for assisted hunting. A dog in Hunt mode tracks wild game (rabbit, raccoon, deer...) and, once trained, chases and takes it for you. Hunting is rural - game lives in forests and the countryside, not in town.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_DogNoiseAttractsZo: The dog's loud barking (stress barks and loud sentinel alerts) is real noise that draws nearby zombies (the symmetric cost). Quiet growls never attract. Turn off to bark without drawing zombies.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_ShowNameTags_toolt: Draw each companion dog's name floating above its head in the world.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_ShowMapMarker_tool: Mark your companion dog on the world map and minimap. The marker follows the dog while it's nearby and stays at its last seen spot when the dog is out of range, so you can find a dog you left behind or lost after dying.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_UrbanSpawnEnabled_: Stray caramelo mutts appear on their own in cities and residential neighbourhoods as you explore, ready to be befriended.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_DogSpawnMultiplier: Scales how often stray dogs appear in the world (caramelo strays, Golden Retrievers and police German Shepherds), keeping their relative rarity. 1.0 is the normal rate; 2.0 doubles all dog spawns, 0 disables them.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_WildDogsInvincible: Stray, wild and released dogs cannot be killed (by zombies, your own hits, vehicles, hunger or fire). Off by default. Turn it on for a gentler world where a stray you find is always safe to tame. Companion dogs are already invincible regardless of this.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_CountDogKillsForPl: When on, zombies killed by your dog also add to your own 'Zombie Kills' count on the character info screen. On by default. Your dog keeps its own kill count in its window either way. Only zombie kills count; hunting is tracked separately.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_DespawnOnOwnerOffl: Stash dogs while owner is offline

Multiplayer servers: when a player disconnects, their dogs are safely stored out of the world (state and needs preserved, frozen) and returned when they reconnect. The active dog in Follow comes back at the owner's side; dogs in Stay/Guard and passive dogs reappear where they were left once the area loads. On by default; turn it off to keep dogs of offline players in the world (invincible and idle).
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_AllowDebugSpawn_to: Show a right-click ground option to spawn test dogs (admins only in multiplayer).
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_CargoCapacityBase_: Minimum cargo weight a saddlebag can hold before the dog's Strength gene adds more. A weak dog (caramelo) gets about this much; this is the floor.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_CargoCapacitySpan_: Extra cargo weight a maximally strong dog adds on top of the base capacity. A strong breed (German Shepherd) approaches base + this; a weak one adds little.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_BreedingEnabled_to: Allow companion dogs (a male and female with the same owner) to mate and have puppies. Disabling hides the breeding action.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_GestationDays_tool: How many in-game days a pregnant dog carries before giving birth.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_MaturityDays_toolt: How many in-game days a puppy takes to grow into an adult, keeping its bond, genes and skills. Puppies age only while loaded near a player; 'Pause growth' on a puppy overrides this.
Sandbox_CompanionDogs_BreedChancePerDay_: Percent chance per in-game day that a nearby adult male and female of the same owner conceive on their own (rolled hourly). Same conditions as manual breeding: fed, loyal, healthy, off cooldown, a free dog slot, breeding not blocked on either. Only while loaded near you. 0 = off.
